rea-agents - v1.6.0
    Preparing search index...
    • application/BinarySession
    • BinarySession

    Class BinarySession

    Owns the single active target shared by CLI and MCP adapters.

    Target transitions are serialized because switching targets tears down the active provider client. A failed switch recreates the previous target instead of retaining a client whose resources were already shut down.

    Implements

    • BinarySessionPort
    • Defined in src/application/BinarySession.ts:68
    Index

    evidenceById

    • evidenceById(
          evidenceId: string,
      ):
          | {
              authority: | "shipped-artifact"
              | "controlled-replay"
              | "historical-reference"
              | "external-service"
              | "analyst-inference";
              confidence: "observed"
              | "derived"
              | "inferred";
              environment:
                  | {
                      architecture: string;
                      id: string;
                      isolation: "process"
                      | "none"
                      | "container"
                      | "virtual-machine";
                      platform: string;
                  }
                  | null;
              evidence_id: string;
              evidence_links: string[];
              limitations: string[];
              locations: (
                  | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                  | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                  | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                  | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                  | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
              )[];
              normalized_result: JSONType;
              operation: string;
              parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
              predicate_type: string;
              provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
              raw_result: JSONType;
              schema_version: 2;
              subject:
                  | {
                      architecture: "x86"
                      | "x86_64"
                      | "arm"
                      | "arm64"
                      | null;
                      digest: { sha256: string };
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      local_path: string;
                      name: string;
                  }
                  | null;
          }
          | undefined

      Read one detached session-owned Evidence record by semantic ID.

    execute

    • execute(
          name: AnalysisOperation,
          arguments_: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>,
          options?: { signal?: AbortSignal },
      ): Promise<Result<AnalysisExecution, AnalysisError>>

      Invoke a provider operation against the active target. Calls may overlap, but a pending target transition prevents new calls from entering until the transition has settled.

      Parameters

      • name: AnalysisOperation
      • arguments_: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>
      • Optionaloptions: { signal?: AbortSignal }

      Returns Promise<Result<AnalysisExecution, AnalysisError>>

      Implementation of BinarySessionPort.execute

      • Defined in src/application/BinarySession.ts:489

      Export immutable cached calls and session evidence for the active target.

                      | null;
                      severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                      status:
                          | "open"
                          | "investigating"
                          | "blocked"
                          | "contradicted"
                          | "resolved";
                      supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
              };
              snapshot_version: 1;
              target: {
                  architecture: "x86"
                  | "x86_64"
                  | "arm"
                  | "arm64"
                  | null;
                  format:
                      | "javascript"
                      | "source-map"
                      | "plist"
                      | "dmg"
                      | "zip"
                      | "pkg"
                      | "asar"
                      | "mach-o"
                      | "elf"
                      | "pe"
                      | "hopper"
                      | "ipa"
                      | "apk";
                  loader_args: string[];
                  sha256: string;
              };
          },
          AnalysisError,
      >

    exportEvidenceBundle

    • exportEvidenceBundle(): {
          artifacts: {
              architecture: "x86"
              | "x86_64"
              | "arm"
              | "arm64"
              | null;
              digest: { sha256: string };
              format:
                  | "unknown"
                  | "file"
                  | "directory"
                  | "javascript"
                  | "source-map"
                  | "plist"
                  | "entitlements"
                  | "dmg"
                  | "zip"
                  | "pkg"
                  | "asar"
                  | "javascript-bundle"
                  | "mach-o-universal"
                  | "mach-o"
                  | "elf"
                  | "pe"
                  | "hopper"
                  | "ipa"
                  | "apk";
          }[];
          bundle_version: 2;
          captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
          environments: {
              architecture: string;
              id: string;
              isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
              platform: string;
          }[];
          providers: { id: string; name: string; version: string
          | null }[];
          records: {
              authority:
                  | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "historical-reference"
                  | "external-service"
                  | "analyst-inference";
              confidence: "observed"
              | "derived"
              | "inferred";
              environment:
                  | {
                      architecture: string;
                      id: string;
                      isolation: "process"
                      | "none"
                      | "container"
                      | "virtual-machine";
                      platform: string;
                  }
                  | null;
              evidence_id: string;
              evidence_links: string[];
              limitations: string[];
              locations: (
                  | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                  | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                  | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                  | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                  | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
              )[];
              normalized_result: JSONType;
              operation: string;
              parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
              predicate_type: string;
              provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
              raw_result: JSONType;
              schema_version: 2;
              subject:
                  | {
                      architecture: "x86"
                      | "x86_64"
                      | "arm"
                      | "arm64"
                      | null;
                      digest: { sha256: string };
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      local_path: string;
                      name: string;
                  }
                  | null;
          }[];
          scenarios: {
              authority: "controlled-replay";
              evidence_id: string;
              operation: string;
          }[];
          unknowns: {
              contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
              domain: string;
              mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
              previous_revision_digest: string
              | null;
              question: string;
              recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
              registry_version: 1;
              relationships: {
                  type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                  unknown_id: string;
              }[];
              required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
              | "controlled-replay"
              | "historical-reference"
              | "external-service"
              | "analyst-inference"
              | null;
              required_confidence: "observed"
              | "derived"
              | "inferred";
              required_environment:
                  | {
                      architecture: string
                      | null;
                      id: string | null;
                      isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                      platform: string | null;
                  }
                  | null;
              resolution: | {
                  disposition: "verified";
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  rationale: string;
              }
              | {
                  disposition: "withdrawn"
                  | "out-of-scope";
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  rationale: string;
              }
              | null;
              revision: number;
              revision_digest: string;
              scope_digest: string
              | null;
              severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
              status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
              supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
              unknown_id: string;
          }[];
      }

      Return a deterministic snapshot without clearing session evidence.

              };
          },
      ): Result<number, AnalysisError>

      Stage validated cached calls for an identical binary and merge its evidence.

      Parameters

      • snapshot: {
            entries: {
                execution: {
                    limitations: string[];
                    locations: (
                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }

                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            path: string;
                            sha256: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                };
                operation: string;

            }[];

                    architecture: "x86"
                    | "x86_64"
                    | "arm"
                    | "arm64"
                    | null;
                    digest: { sha256: string };
                    format:
                        | "unknown"
                        | "file"

                | null }[];

                    authority:
                        | "shipped-artifact"
                        | "controlled-replay"
                        | "historical-reference"
                        | "external-service"
                        | "analyst-inference";
                    confidence: "observed"
                    | "derived"
                    | "inferred";
                    environment:
                        | {
                            architecture: string;
                            id: string;
                            isolation: "process"
                            | "none"
                            | "container"

                            platform: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                    evidence_id: string;
                    evidence_links: string[];
                    limitations: string[];
                    locations: (
                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                        | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                        | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                        | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                        | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                    )[];

                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"

                            | null;

                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"

                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            local_path: string;
                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                }[];
                scenarios: {
                    authority: "controlled-replay";
                    evidence_id: string;
                    operation: string;
                }[];
                unknowns: {
                    contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    domain: string;
                    mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                    previous_revision_digest: string
                    | null;
                    question: string;
                    recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                    registry_version: 1;
                    relationships: {
                        type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                        unknown_id: string;
                    }[];
                    required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                    | "controlled-replay"
                    | "historical-reference"
                    | "external-service"
                    | "analyst-inference"
                    | null;
                    required_confidence: "observed"
                    | "derived"
                    | "inferred";
                    required_environment:
                        | {
                            architecture: string
                            | null;
                            id: string | null;
                            isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                            platform: string | null;
                        }
                        | null;
                    resolution: | {
                        disposition: "verified";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | {
                        disposition: "withdrawn"
                        | "out-of-scope";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | null;
                    revision: number;
                    revision_digest: string;
                    scope_digest: string
                    | null;
                    severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                    status:
                        | "open"
                        | "investigating"
                        | "blocked"
                        | "contradicted"
                        | "resolved";
                    supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];
            };
            snapshot_version: 1;
            target: {
                architecture: "x86"
                | "x86_64"
                | "arm"
                | "arm64"
                | null;
                format:
                    | "javascript"
                    | "source-map"
                    | "plist"
                    | "dmg"
                    | "zip"
                    | "pkg"
                    | "asar"
                    | "mach-o"
                    | "elf"
                    | "pe"
                    | "hopper"
                    | "ipa"
                    | "apk";
                loader_args: string[];
                sha256: string;
            };
        }

      Returns Result<number, AnalysisError>

    importEvidenceBundle

    • importEvidenceBundle(
          bundle: unknown,
      ): Result<number, EvidenceIntegrityError | EvidenceLimitError>

      Parameters

      • bundle: unknown

      Returns Result<number, EvidenceIntegrityError | EvidenceLimitError>

                              name: string;
                          }
                          | null;
                  }[];
                  scenarios: {
                      authority: "controlled-replay";

                      operation: string;
                  }[];

                      | "historical-reference"
                      | "external-service"

                      | "inferred";

                              platform: string | null;
                          }
                          | null;

                          disposition: "verified";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | {
                          disposition: "withdrawn"
                          | "out-of-scope";

                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | null;

                          | "open"
                          | "investigating"
                          | "blocked"
                          | "contradicted"
                          | "resolved";
                      supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
              };

      List retained workspace revisions in canonical identity order.

      Returns readonly {
          bundle: {
              artifacts: {
                  architecture: "x86" | "x86_64" | "arm" | "arm64" | null;
                  digest: { sha256: string };
                  format:
                      | "unknown"
                      | "file"
                      | "directory"

                      | "javascript-bundle"
                      | "mach-o-universal"

                      | "elf"
                      | "pe"
                      | "hopper"
                      | "ipa"
                      | "apk";
              }[];

              captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
              environments: {

                  id: string;
                  isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
                  platform: string;
              }[];

              | null }[];
              records: {

                      | "shipped-artifact"
                      | "controlled-replay"
                      | "historical-reference"

                      | "analyst-inference";

                  | "derived"
                  | "inferred";

                      | {

                          | "virtual-machine";

                      | null;
                  evidence_id: string;
                  evidence_links: string[];
                  limitations: string[];
                  locations: (
                      | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                      | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                      | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                      | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                      | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                  )[];
                  normalized_result: JSONType;
                  operation: string;
                  parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                  predicate_type: string;
                  provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                  raw_result: JSONType;
                  schema_version: 2;
                  subject:
                      | {
                          architecture: "x86"
                          | "x86_64"
                          | "arm"
                          | "arm64"
                          | null;
                          digest: { sha256: string };
                          format:
                              | "unknown"
                              | "file"
                              | "directory"
                              | "javascript"
                              | "source-map"
                              | "plist"
                              | "entitlements"
                              | "dmg"
                              | "zip"
                              | "pkg"
                              | "asar"
                              | "javascript-bundle"
                              | "mach-o-universal"
                              | "mach-o"
                              | "elf"
                              | "pe"
                              | "hopper"
                              | "ipa"
                              | "apk";
                          local_path: string;
                          name: string;
                      }
                      | null;
              }[];
              scenarios: {
                  authority: "controlled-replay";
                  evidence_id: string;
                  operation: string;
              }[];
              unknowns: {
                  contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                  domain: string;
                  mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                  previous_revision_digest: string
                  | null;
                  question: string;
                  recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                  registry_version: 1;
                  relationships: {
                      type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
                  required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "historical-reference"
                  | "external-service"
                  | "analyst-inference"
                  | null;
                  required_confidence: "observed"
                  | "derived"
                  | "inferred";
                  required_environment:
                      | {
                          architecture: string
                          | null;
                          id: string | null;
                          isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                          platform: string | null;
                      }
                      | null;
                  resolution: | {
                      disposition: "verified";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | {
                      disposition: "withdrawn"
                      | "out-of-scope";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | null;
                  revision: number;
                  revision_digest: string;
                  scope_digest: string
                  | null;
                  severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                  status:
                      | "open"
                      | "investigating"
                      | "blocked"
                      | "contradicted"
                      | "resolved";
                  supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                  unknown_id: string;
              }[];
          };
          name: string;
          previous_revision_digest: string
          | null;
          revision: number;
          revision_digest: string;
          runs: (
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];
                  integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                  integrity_policy: "fail"
                  | "record-and-continue";
                  left: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  limitations: string[];
                  max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                  options: {
                      change_limit: number;
                      max_compression_ratio: number;
                      max_depth: number;
                      max_entries: number;
                      max_entry_bytes: number;
                      max_path_bytes: number;
                      max_total_bytes: number;
                      page_size: number;
                  };
                  request_sha256: string;
                  result_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  right: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  run_id: string;
                  schema_version: 1;
                  status: "complete"
                  | "running";
              }
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];
                  integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                  integrity_policy: "fail"
                  | "record-and-continue";
                  left: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  legacy_request_identity: true;
                  limitations: string[];
                  max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                  options: {
                      change_limit: number;
                      max_compression_ratio: number;
                      max_depth: number;
                      max_entries: number;
                      max_entry_bytes: number;
                      max_path_bytes: number;
                      max_total_bytes: number;
                      page_size: number;
                  };
                  request_sha256: string;
                  result_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  right: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  run_id: string;
                  schema_version: 1;
                  status: "complete"
                  | "running";
              }
          )[];
          workspace_id: string;
          workspace_version: 1;
      }[]

    listUnknowns

    • listUnknowns(
          filters?: {
              domain?: string;
              severity?: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
              status?:
                  | "open"
                  | "investigating"
                  | "blocked"
                  | "contradicted"
                  | "resolved";

      ): {
          contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
          domain: string;
          mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
          previous_revision_digest: string
          | null;
          question: string;
          recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
          registry_version: 1;
          relationships: {
              type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
              unknown_id: string;
          }[];
          required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
          | "controlled-replay"
          | "historical-reference"
          | "external-service"
          | "analyst-inference"
          | null;
          required_confidence: "observed"
          | "derived"
          | "inferred";
          required_environment:
              | {
                  architecture: string
                  | null;
                  id: string | null;
                  isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                  platform: string | null;
              }
              | null;
          resolution: | {
              disposition: "verified";
              evidence_ids: string[];
              rationale: string;
          }
          | {
              disposition: "withdrawn"
              | "out-of-scope";

              rationale: string;
          }
          | null;

          status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
          supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
          unknown_id: string;
      }[]

      Query stable current residual-unknown heads.

    onAvailabilityChanged

    • onAvailabilityChanged(listener: () => void | Promise<void>): () => void

      Observe runtime provider-health changes that affect discovery metadata.

      Parameters

      Returns () => void

    open

    • open(
          path: string,
          options?: {
              signal?: AbortSignal;
              snapshot?: {
                  entries: {
                      execution: {
                          limitations: string[];
                          locations: (
                              | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                              | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                              | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                              | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                              | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                          )[];
                          provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                          raw_result: JSONType;
                          result: JSONType;
                          subject:
                              | {
                                  architecture: "x86"
                                  | "x86_64"
                                  | "arm"
                                  | "arm64"
                                  | null;
                                  format:
                                      | "unknown"
                                      | "file"
                                      | "directory"
                                      | "javascript"
                                      | "source-map"
                                      | "plist"
                                      | "entitlements"
                                      | "dmg"
                                      | "zip"
                                      | "pkg"
                                      | "asar"
                                      | "javascript-bundle"
                                      | "mach-o-universal"
                                      | "mach-o"
                                      | "elf"
                                      | "pe"
                                      | "hopper"
                                      | "ipa"
                                      | "apk";
                                  path: string;
                                  sha256: string;
                              }
                              | null;
                      };
                      operation: string;
                      parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                      query_id: string;
                  }[];
                  evidence_bundle: {
                      artifacts: {
                          architecture: "x86"
                          | "x86_64"
                          | "arm"
                          | "arm64"
                          | null;
                          digest: { sha256: string };
                          format:
                              | "unknown"
                              | "file"

                              | "source-map"

                              | "hopper"
                              | "ipa"
                              | "apk";
                      }[];
                      bundle_version: 2;
                      captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                      environments: {
                          architecture: string;

                                      | "directory"

                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      loader_args: string[];
                      sha256: string;
                  };
              };
              targetKind?: "executable"
              | "database"
              | "archive"
              | "artifact";
          },
      ): Promise<Result<BinaryTarget, AnalysisError>>

      Open or switch targets after draining calls against the current target. Returns the switch failure even if best-effort restoration also fails.

      Parameters

      • path: string
      • options: {
            signal?: AbortSignal;
            snapshot?: {
                entries: {
                    execution: {
                        limitations: string[];
                        locations: (
                            | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                            | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                            | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                            | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }

                        result: JSONType;

                        | "arm"

                | null;
            severity: "low"
            | "medium"
            | "high"
            | "critical";
            supporting_evidence_ids: string[];

                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";

                      | "running";
                  }
              )[];
              workspace_id: string;
              workspace_version: 1;
          },
      ): "added"
      | "duplicate"

      Retain one validated immutable workspace revision for session resources.

      Parameters

      • workspace: {
            bundle: {
                artifacts: {
                    architecture: "x86" | "x86_64" | "arm" | "arm64" | null;

                            platform: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                    evidence_id: string;
                    evidence_links: string[];
                    limitations: string[];
                    locations: (
                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                        | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                        | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                        | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                        | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                    )[];
                    normalized_result: JSONType;
                    operation: string;
                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    predicate_type: string;
                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                    raw_result: JSONType;
                    schema_version: 2;
                    subject:
                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;
                            digest: { sha256: string };
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            local_path: string;
                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                }[];
                scenarios: {
                    authority: "controlled-replay";
                    evidence_id: string;
                    operation: string;
                }[];
                unknowns: {
                    contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    domain: string;
                    mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                    previous_revision_digest: string
                    | null;
                    question: string;
                    recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                    registry_version: 1;
                    relationships: {
                        type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                        unknown_id: string;
                    }[];
                    required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                    | "controlled-replay"
                    | "historical-reference"
                    | "external-service"
                    | "analyst-inference"
                    | null;
                    required_confidence: "observed"
                    | "derived"
                    | "inferred";
                    required_environment:
                        | {
                            architecture: string
                            | null;
                            id: string | null;
                            isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                            platform: string | null;
                        }
                        | null;
                    resolution: | {
                        disposition: "verified";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | {
                        disposition: "withdrawn"
                        | "out-of-scope";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | null;
                    revision: number;
                    revision_digest: string;
                    scope_digest: string
                    | null;
                    severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                    status:
                        | "open"
                        | "investigating"
                        | "blocked"
                        | "contradicted"
                        | "resolved";
                    supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];
            };
            name: string;
            previous_revision_digest: string
            | null;
            revision: number;
            revision_digest: string;
            runs: (
                | {
                    comparison_evidence_id: string
                    | null;
                    completed_stages: (
                        | "inventory_left"
                        | "inventory_right"
                        | "compare_artifacts"
                        | "find_changed_behavior"
                    )[];
                    integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                    integrity_policy: "fail"
                    | "record-and-continue";
                    left: {
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"
                            | "plist"
                            | "entitlements"
                            | "dmg"

                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";
                        graph_sha256: string;
                        manifest_id: string;
                        root_sha256: string;
                    };
                    left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                    limitations: string[];
                    max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                    options: {
                        change_limit: number;
                        max_compression_ratio: number;
                        max_depth: number;
                        max_entries: number;
                        max_entry_bytes: number;
                        max_path_bytes: number;

                        page_size: number;

                    | null;
                    right: {
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"

                            | "entitlements"

                        root_sha256: string;

                    run_id: string;
                    schema_version: 1;
                    status: "complete"
                    | "running";
                }
                | {

                    | null;
                    completed_stages: (
                        | "inventory_left"
